feedback: I specifically chose this plan because of the Prime Video inclusion. After calculating what I spent separately on streaming versus getting them free with this telecom plan the savings are substantial every month. Smart bundling strategy. Content variety on the bundled platform meets my needs.
Cannot access SonyLIV with my plan.

SonyLIV bundle broken but internet speed of 100 Mbps is excellent and coverage in Noida is solid. Bad entertainment perk but good core connectivity service. The streaming integration with telecom plan is seamless.
Gaana okay but data runs out fast.

The combination of Disney+ Hotstar and JioCinema bundled together makes this the most entertainment-rich telecom plan available. Both services work at full quality with complete content libraries. No restrictions or mobile-only limitations. The OTT benefit alone makes plan competitive in market.

I am extremely happy with the OTT bundle on my Rs 799 plan. The SonyLIV subscription works perfectly with full HD streaming and no content restrictions. This single benefit makes the plan significantly more valuable than competing offers. The OTT benefit alone makes plan competitive in market.

OTT average and data balance also just okay. Both the entertainment add-on and the daily data sit in neutral without any distinguishing quality for users. I watch content on the bundled service almost daily.
OTT bundle best among operators.
YouTube Premium terrible but speed is excellent.
Gaana streaming quality excellent on plan.
OTT quality capped at 480p only.
Average OTT but coverage excellent.

The OTT bundle is fine. Not amazing not terrible. Zee5 has some content I watch occasionally but is not primary reason I stay. Nice to have rather than must have feature. Average implementation of standard industry practice. Having entertainment bundled eliminates need for separate subscriptions.

The so-called entertainment bundle adds zero value because the included SonyLIV has contnt I can find free on YouTube anyway. The premium content that makes SonyLIV worth subscribing to is not included in the telecom bundle version. Entertainment perks add genuine daily value to the plan.

The so-called entertainment bundle adds zero value because the included JioCinema has content I can find free on YouTube anyway. The premium content that makes JioCinema worth subscribing to is not included in the telecom bundle version. The OTT benefit alone makes plan competitive in market.

Spotify bundle is broken but at least the internet speed of 300 Mbps is fast for other tasks in Faridabad. OTT does not work but data service performs well. The streaming quality and content make this genuinely worthwhile.
Love the JioCinema bundle included.

The entertainment bundle is what sold me on this operator. Free Prime Video access with my recharge means I can stream movies shows and live sports without paying separately. Content library is extensive and streaming quality consistently good. I watch content on the bundled service almost daily.

The OTT bundle that supposedly includes Prime Video is practically useless. The subscriptn only gives access to a tiny fraction of the actual content library and is restricted to mobile screen only. Cannot cast to TV or share with family. Not the real Prime Video experience.
JioCinema works perfectly with plan.
Disney+ Hotstar terrible but speed is excellent.
MX Player terrible but speed is excellent.

The so-called free Prime Video subscriptn is heavily restricted compared to direct subscription. Content library smaller qlity capped at 480p and only watch on one device. They should be transparent about these limitations in advertising. The streaming integration with telecom plan is seamless.

I cannot access Zee5 at all despite it being listed as a plan benefit. Every time I try to login through the app it gives error messages. Support says wait for activation but it has been over a week. OTT benefit is theoretical only.

The entertainment bundle is what sold me on this operator. Free MX Player access with my recharge means I can stream movies shows and live sports without paying separately. Content library is extensive and stremng qlity consistently good. Having entertainment bundled eliminates need for separate subscriptions.
OTT benefit heavily restricted. Misleading.
OTT broken but speed good and covrage solid.
The Prime Video benefit alone justifies plan cost.
OTT inclusion makes plan unbeatable.

The so-called free Disney+ Hotstar subscription is heavily restricted compared to direct subscription. Content library smaller quality capped at 480p and only watch on one device. They should be transparent about these limitations in advertising. I watch content on the bundled service almost daily.

The Gaana streaming works perfectly but the internet speed in Malad is too slow at 50 Mbps to actually stream in HD. Good content access undermined by poor bandwidth. This bundled value keeps me loyal to this operator.

I appreciate that the MX Player bundle activates instantly after reacharg without needing separate registration or activation codes. The seamless integration between telecom plan and stremng service shows good technical partnership implementation. Content variety on the bundled platform meets my needs.
Zee5 login always fails through app.
OTT services keep disappearing randomly.
HD streaming on Prime Video works great.
OTT broken but plan price is fair.
Average OTT standard plan typical speed.

The streaming bundle with SonyLIV included is average. It works when I want to watch something casual but the content library is limited compared to a full subscription. Standard telecom OTT offering that meets minimum expectations. I watch content on the bundled service almost daily.
Good Zee5 but intrenet speed slow.

The so-called entertainment bundle adds zero value because the included MX Player has content I can find free on YouTube anyway. The premium content that makes MX Player worth subscribing to is not included in the telecom bundle version. Entertainment perks add genuine daily value to the plan.

The OTT bundle with Zee5 is average. Works for casual viewing and content selection decent enough for something free with recharge. Not the kind of experience that makes you cancel paid subscriptns but acceptable as added bonus to existing plan.

The OTT bundle services are the standout feature. My Rs 599 plan includes Spotify which gives access to thousands of movies and shows at no extra charge. Activation automatic with recharge and stremng qlity consistently excellent. Entertainment perks add genuine daily value to the plan.

I cannot access Spotify at all despite it being listed as a plan benefit. Every time I try to login through the app it gives error messages. Support says wait for activation but it has been over a week. OTT benefit is theoretical only.

Zee5 does not work the plan at Rs 599 is overpriced and speed barely reaches 200 Mbps. Triple failure across entertainment plan value and performance. The streaming quality and content make this genuinely worthwhile.

OTT average and data balance also just okay. Both the entertainment add-on and the daily data sit in neutral without any distinguishing quality for users in Kharadi. The streaming quality and content make this genuinely worthwhile.
OTT broken but speed good and covrage solid in Jaipur. Having entertainment bundled eliminates need for separate subscriptions.

The OTT bundle with Spotify is average. Works for casual viewing and content selection decent enough for something free with recharge. Not the kind of experience that makes you cancel paid subscriptions but acceptable as added bonus to existing plan.
Great streaming bundle with JioCinema.

The Disney+ Hotstar subscription that comes with the plan is the most basic tier possible with no premium content no HD quality and limited device support. Calling this a free subscription is misleading when it is actually a crippled demo version.

The so-called free MX Player subscriptn is heavily restricted compared to direct subscription. Content library smaller qlity capped at 480p and only watch on one device. They should be transparent about these limitations in advertising. The streaming integration with telecom plan is seamless.
Great Disney+ Hotstar good plan and fast speed.

The Disney+ Hotstar and Prime Video bundle is excellent combined with a well priced Rs 699 plan and fast 50 Mbps speed. Complete entertainment and connectivity package. Entertainment perks add genuine daily value to the plan.
Average OTT but coverage excellent in Dwarka.

OTT average and data balance also just okay. Both the entertainment add-on and the daily data sit in neutral without any distinguishing qlity for users in Surat. The streaming integration with telecom plan is seamless.

OTT great but data balance too low.
Bundled MX Player stremng does not work.
Average OTT standard plan typical speed in Ghaziabad.
Streaming perk is genuinely useful here.

the ott perks with this plan r genuinely useful unlike some operators who bundle obscure apps nobody wants, getting utube premium which i actually use daily makes this excellent value, streaming works flawlessly without quality compromises. Entertainment perks add genuine daily value to the plan.

The JioCinema subscription that comes with the plan is the most basic tier possible with no premium content no HD quality and limited device support. Calling this a free subscription is misleading when it is actually a crippled demo version.

Prime Video bundle keeps deactivating and the customer support cannot fix it despite multiple complaints. Both the stremng service and human support are failing. I watch content on the bundled service almost daily.

The Zee5 bundle is great but plan pricing at Rs 699 is steep and daily data of 5GB runs out fast. Good streaming undermined by expensive plan and limited data. Content variety on the bundled platform meets my needs.
Free Disney+ Hotstar with plan is excellent value.
Prime Video content excellent on bundled plan.

The OTT bundle included with my plan is genuinely one of the best perks in Indian telecom right now. Getting free Zee5 and Prime Video subscriptions saves me over Rs 500 monthly that I would otherwise spend on separate streaming subscriptions. Content quality excellent and activation seamless.

The OTT bundle that supposedly includes SonyLIV is practically useless. The subscription only gives access to a tiny fraction of the actual content library and is restricted to mobile screen only. Cannot cast to TV or share with family. Not the real SonyLIV experience.
